title: CRA Business Taxes
body_text:
CRA Business Taxes
1	Introduction to CRA Business Taxes
1.1	Introduction to CRA Business Taxes
This Part provides information related to Business Taxes, a product on the
PaymentStream芒聞垄
Direct platform. For more information about
PaymentStream
Direct functions, see the
PaymentStream
Direct Part. Business Taxes allows financial institutions to
submit business tax payments and filings electronically, and
view filing and remittance history in
PaymentStream
Direct.
Business Taxes isn芒聙聶t connected to financial institutions芒聙聶 banking systems.
Frequently used CRA remittance vouchers are available in Business Taxes and can be filed electronically along with the payment. Don芒聙聶t send paper remittance vouchers to Central 1 or CRA for payments that were submitted electronically. Dispose of the paper remittance vouchers per your financial institution芒聙聶s internal policy.
CRA remittance vouchers that aren芒聙聶t available in Business Taxes can芒聙聶t be processed electronically and must be sent to CRA by mail or courier.
Note:	Don芒聙聶t accept remittance vouchers that indicate a zero balance or a refund claim.

CPS Admin Application Part

Electronic Bill Payments System Part
File Exchange and Report Distribution Part

PaymentStream芒聞垄 Direct Part
User Management Part
1.2	Enrolling in Business Taxes
Your financial institution must be set up on the
PaymentStream
Direct platform to implement Business Taxes. See the
PaymentStream
芒聞垄 Direct Part for more information. To enroll in Business Taxes, contact Client Support Services. See Section 1.4, Contacts and Websites.
Central 1 will work with your financial institution to implement the requested functionality and branding, if applicable. Access to a test system will be provided with the implementation of the production system.
1.3	Payment Limit for Business Taxes
The Business Taxes limit for CRA payments is the same as your financial institution芒聙聶s bill payment limit. To increase the bill payment limit, complete the Financial Institution Transaction Limit Modification Request 芒聙聯 Electronic Bill Payments System, Form 2424, and forward it to the applicable provincial central as instructed on the form.
Related Information
Financial Institution Transaction Limit Modification Request 芒聙聯 Electronic Bill Payments System,
Form 2424

Contact CRA about cases of bad actors, identity theft, or suspected fraudulently obtained CRA payments as follows:
If you know the payment type (Business Account versus Individual Account), send the inquiry to the respective email address.
If you don芒聙聶t know the payment type, send the request/inquiry to both email addresses (on the same email) and CRA will do the analysis and ensure it is directed accordingly.
If CRA receives a request/inquiry that is determined to be for a different federal government department,聽CRA will forward it to the Receiver General who will determine the correct department and forward it as required.
